### Completion checklist

Before marking as the Initiative as _Completed_, make sure that:

- [ ] The documentation on the website is updated with the new feature(s) or change(s)
- [ ] Zookeeper is able to use the new feature(s) or change(s)
- [ ] The feature(s) or change(s) are deployed to the public in a numbered release
- [ ] Any applicable feature flag(s) are removed or globally enabled.
